target: 8. The Nightmare Won't End
(If it's to survive this situation... I can't afford to care about appearances anymore!)
(They look exactly like the real ones. Probably their memories too...)
(If that's the case, then... this is the only way!)
Totsumura-san…
When I give the signal, run...
Even if you tell me to run all of a sudden...
Please. Just trust me on this.
...I can trust you, right?
Yes... Don't think about anything and just run for it.
What are you muttering about.
Hey, Mio-chan. Who knows what these guys are plotting? Let's just finish them off.
Yeah.
(Damn it...! Like hell I'm going to let them kill me so easily!)
Well then, Shin-chan. Are you ready?
(Alright... now!)
I-Is that Erika-san...! Why is she here!?

Erika-chan!?
Where! Where is she!?
Now, Totsumura-san!
Shinpei-kun, where!? Where is Erika-chan!?
Wait, even you fell for it, Totsumura-san!?
Didn't I tell you to run when I gave the signal!
Yeah, but you said Erika-chan was here, Shinpei-kun...
Damn it, she's nowhere to be seen! You tricked me, you punk!
I messed up... I should have explained it a bit more clearly to Totsumura-san.
Ahahaha! Too bad, your plan failed.
Guh...!
Plan failed...?
Aah, damn it! So that's what that was!?
You little punk!! How dare you trick me~~!!
I won't let you off anymore! I'm gonna kill you!!
(I messed up...! This is the worst possible outcome...)
U-Uwoooohhh!! Shut up, you piece of shit!!!
Totsumura-san…!
How's that... I blew that fake's head clean off...! Even I can do this much...
This much, what?
Wha!? Mio, when did you...!
Guh...!
…Totsumura-san!!
T-The kitchen knife is in my stomach... She didn't hesitate at all... this isn't normal...
Guh, no good... I can't put any strength into my body.
But, hehe, I did it, Shinpei-kun. I defeated my Shadow... now it's just Mio-chan.
So he says, but how long are you going to sleep, Tetsu-san? Stop playing around and get up.
Eh?
I was thinking of letting him get his hopes up a bit more, but you spoiled it too quickly, Mio-chan.
You guys... are you immortal or something...
Well, I wonder.
Gah!
Stop...
Stop ittttttttt!!
A... Ah... Totsumura-san...
So, what are we doing with Shinpei-kun?
Killing him, of course.
Well, I'll leave the rest to you, Mio-chan. I have things I need to do.
That's fine, but please don't do anything unnecessary.
I know, I know.
Uugh... Totsumura-san...
Shin-chan, trying to fight us head-on was a complete waste of your life.
(Damn it, to someone like this...)
(I'm sorry, Totsumura-san... Next time, next time for sure...)
Well then, goodbye.
4th Loop
(I-I'm alive...?)
(Yes, I made it back...! Now I can start over again!)
Wait, huh...?
Shin-chan, where are you~? You're hiding around here, right? Come out~.
She's here...!
Hey, that fake Mio-chan, she's holding a kitchen knife...!
(This is... the exact same place. And it's exactly the same as just a moment ago...)
N-No... don't come any closer...!
I said don't come any closer...!
Which means...!?
Found~ you! So that's where you were!
(I finally got to start over... but at this rate...)
I have something I wanna ask you, Shin-chan...
U... Uwaaaahhh!!!!
(The nightmare...)
(Has only just begun, huh...)
